{{Infobox artifact
| name = Archlord weapon
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Survivors of the second round receive an [[Archlord weapon]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Naian]] slams his claws into the flat of [[Lindon]]'s [[Archlord weapon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] has an [[Archlord weapon]] in her [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Archlord]] weapons can function on [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
